title: Speaking & Listening
objective: Students will explore speaking & listening concepts including Reciting Poetry.

steps.content: Let's discover the amazing world of Reciting Poetry!
Learn poems by heart and recite with appropriate intonation, adding visual displays to descriptions when appropriate, and producing complete sentences in spoken presentations
Time to try this out: Recite a poem from memory with expression and clear enunciation
Can you memorise a short poem and recite it with expression — changing their voice to match the mood of the words?
Great job! Today we learned about Reciting Poetry. Recite a poem from memory with expression and clear enunciation Add a drawing or visual display to support an oral description or presentation
